name: Plerdy
description: All-in-one CRO platform with heatmaps, session replay, SEO checker, conversion funnels, pop-up forms and A/B testing.

seo.title: Plerdy — Session Replay / UX Analytics
seo.meta_description: Plerdy: All-in-one CRO platform with heatmaps, session replay, SEO checker, conversion funnels, pop-up forms and A/B testing.

when_to_use: Heatmaps combined with SEO checker for CRO analysis
Session replay correlated with conversion funnel events
A/B testing integrated with behavior analytics data
Pop-up form performance tracked with session context

pros: Bundles CRO, SEO and replay in one subscription
A/B testing and pop-up forms remove separate tool costs
SEO checker is a nice cross-sell for content teams
Reasonable pricing for the breadth of features
cons: Each module is weaker than the category leader
UI and translations feel rough in places
Statistical rigor of A/B tests is limited
review.verdict: Swiss-army knife CRO platform that's fine for SMBs, but none of its modules would win a standalone bake-off.
review.best_for: SMBs wanting SEO, heatmaps and popups bundled at one price.
review.not_for: Teams needing best-in-class A/B testing or rigorous analytics.
